item.title: Ukrainians have launched a new online “game”: changing fuel station statuses on maps, marking empty stations as supplied and supplied stations as empty.
item.description: The result is chaos in Moscow: drivers waste time, burn extra fuel, create traffic jams, and clash at gas stations.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Look, I'm just a humble billionaire former hedge fund manager. I don't know anything about stock trading.
item.dc:creator: CaptainBackPain

item.title: Trump has blocked two murders committed by I.C.E.
item.description:
Whether the fatal shootings of Alex Pretti and Renee Good will result in criminal charges remains highly uncertain and legally complex. While Minnesota state authorities are actively investigating, federal agencies are withholding crucial evidence, and any state charges could be challenged in federal court. The situation is characterized by ongoing friction between local and federal officials:
Hennepin County Attorney Mary Moriarty and the Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension (BCA) are investigating both killings to determine if the agents can be prosecuted. The medical examiner's office has officially ruled both deaths as homicides.
The FBI and Department of Homeland Security (DHS) formally rejected requests from Minnesota investigators to share key evidence, such as body camera footage, agent names, and ballistic evidence. In response, the state of Minnesota launched a lawsuit against the DOJ and DHS to force the release of this evidence.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: Robert Reich: "Do you know why the Founding Fathers were so pissed off at King George III of England... Any of this sound familiar" – Masterclass by Inequality Media
item.description: wiigf.com/2017/11/the-declaration-of-independence-is.html?m=1
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Lord Humungus has left us
item.description: With great sadness I regret to inform you that Kjell Nilsson who played The Lord Humungus has passed away. Kjell lived a colorful life on his own terms, with unwavering conviction, an adventurous heart, and a spirit that refused to surrender. He was 76 years old. Rest in Peace.
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Various things that may eventually be satisfying, or funny.
item.description:
One for the memories !
Thank god the hammer didn't fell ....
This is pretty cool !
He celebrated ....
This orangutan just took the wheel.
11 wheels, 10 Vespa engines, 10 wheel drive, 1 vehicle.
The knot for lifting things out of reach.
Butter packer.
Butter slapper.
Step conveyor poka-yoke ...
Some people still think ground tents are the best camping setup…
Iranian artist Soheila creates art with tiny ceramic tiles.
This water fountain at Hydropolis science center.
Transmission rebuild done by somebody who's done it a few times.
Making a street sign look new.
Cleaning another street sign.
Dried paint being removed.
This cabinet movement.
Road work in Japan.

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Adrian Grenier
"The life of every man is a diary in which he means to write one story, and writes another, and his humblest hour is when he compares the volume as it is with what he vowed to make it." - J.M. Barrie So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: sleeperkid

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1736 (walkable cities)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Thanks to everyone who gave birthday wishes.
Didn't have any tours, and so I did some birding. My year list is now at 202 for Yavapai County... and I saw a total of 42 species yesterday which was amusing, as that's now how old I am.
Quilbert.
I also just finished painting an Eastern Kingbird for my art series, incidentally
New fossil cretaceous birb with long tailplumes!
Reconstruction of this cretaceous cutie
Leptoceratops.
Same artist as the last, Christopher Di Piazza
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I love you too." ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 449
item.description:
I thinkk this was from April?
I don’t think I’ve fact-checked any of these
Thought one of my sisters might enjoy the book I was reading. She was reading the same one. Below is from said title so - spoilers? I guess?
They’re so blurry, soz.
Thank you: https://imgur.com/gallery/cao4dgM/comment/2505246515
Edit: oh it cuts. FFS. Ok he replies that that’s why he loves gays.
Again, not fact-checked
I know I’ve posted this one before but…. Still valid.
Ach next image was supposed to be the one where god creates humans. And an angel replies ’you you fucked up a perfectly good monkey is what you did. Look at it! It’s got anxiety!’
Umm I think this was a book tip someone sent me?
Pic I took at Forbidden Planet in London. I wanted to buy it so bad but was already wayy over my planned budget.
Oh shoot I don’t remember what sketch this was. Edit: thank you! https://imgur.com/gallery/cao4dgM/comment/2505251531
Sounds solid to me
Scotland’s national animal is the unicorn
Ok but back up to the mushroom cause I have questions
*shrugs*
item.dc:creator: indigenous101

item.title: Eartha Kitt
item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: Wife's not on imgur, here's what I saved for her
item.description:
Dog tax. Cider says "hi." Say "hi" back, she'll hear it with those ear. Next up is a promotion for my two science fiction novels, which are free on Smashwords during July. Only the ebooks are free, but audiobook and paperback versions are also available elsewhere.
Tall Boy Sun is about a divorced, alcoholic who still thinks he's going to turn his life around be becoming a great starfighter pilot. It's a long road to sobriety and redemption: https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/1978635
Crew of Exiles is about a misanthropic transcendent being exiled into a human body, who is soon adopted by a plucky VR gamer adventuring out into the real world. Get the epub for free here: https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/1873592 Totally free (as an ebook for July only), stand-alone, science fiction.
item.dc:creator: ChareAndFlaff

item.title: iF YoU sEE SOMeThinG, sAy sOMeThiNG
